sections.paragraph: pl. f. כְּסָתֹות cushions, pillows. Eze 13:18, 20 Eze 13:20. LXX. προσκεφάλαια. Vulg. pulvilli. According to the Rabbins, bolsters. The root is כָּסָה. The letter ת, although not radical, and here marking the feminine gender, is also preserved in the pl. as in קֶשֶׁת דֶּלֶת, compare Lehrg. p. 474.
